# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-01

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-operate
- HEAD: 40a9ce8
- Last release: v0.2.2
- Proposed target: v0.2.3 (bump: patch)
- Gate: pass

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | GitHub Actions for HEAD (CI and CodeQL workflows) completed success; local `swift build` + `swift test` + `swiftlint` green with `DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer` |
| Version consistency | PASS | 3 public version mentions checked and corrected to v0.2.3 |
| README / doc currency | WARN | README license footer says MIT; roadmap stale; CHANGELOG missing [0.2.2] and [0.2.3] headers |
| Coverage vs threshold | WARN | lines 73.72% / threshold 80% (default, no repo hard gate) |
| Coverage regression | PASS | baseline 73.72% → 73.72% (delta 0%) |
| Patch coverage | PASS | n/a — no code diff versus v0.2.2 (only `.github/workflows/release.yml` changed) |
| Assets preview | PASS | expected DMG (`symoperate.dmg`) + Homebrew cask via `.github/workflows/release.yml` |
| Security | PASS | 0 open critical; 2 open medium CodeQL `actions/missing-workflow-permissions` alerts in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` |

## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] README license footer still says MIT while project is Apache-2.0**
  - **Status quo:** `README.md:111` footer reads `MIT © 2026 Daniel Justus.`, inconsistent with the Apache-2.0 badge on line 7 and the `LICENSE` file.
  - **Likely cause:** The v0.2.2 prerelease fixed the badge (see `.github/prerelease/2026-06-26T205300Z.md`) but missed the footer.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update the footer to `Apache-2.0 © 2026 Daniel Justus.` or remove the license name from the footer.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] Roadmap has outdated v0.1 label and unchecked completed items**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/roadmap.md:3` labels `v0.1 (current)` though the project is at v0.2.3; lines 30-34 list `Notarized DMG + Homebrew cask`, `CI on macOS runner (build + test); SwiftLint gate`, and `Update checker` as unchecked even though they are implemented or in progress in the current release.
  - **Likely cause:** Roadmap was not updated after v0.2.x work shipped.
  - **Proposed solution:** Restructure roadmap to reflect the current v0.2.3 state and mark completed infra items.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] CHANGELOG missing entries for v0.2.2 and v0.2.3**
  - **Status quo:** `CHANGELOG.md` only has `## [Unreleased]` and `## [0.2.1]` sections; the v0.2.2 release and the upcoming v0.2.3 release are not represented.
  - **Likely cause:** Release notes have been tracked in GitHub releases rather than in `CHANGELOG.md`.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add `## [0.2.2]` and `## [0.2.3]` sections with the corresponding release notes (PR #48/#49 for v0.2.2, PR #52 for v0.2.3).
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall line coverage is below the default 80% expectation**
  - **Status quo:** `swift test --enable-code-coverage` produced line coverage of 73.72% (regions 60.97%, functions 73.16%). The repo has no configured hard coverage gate (no `fail_under`, no CI coverage step). The baseline at v0.2.2 measures the same 73.72%.
  - **Likely cause:** `AppService`, `OCRService`, `InputService`, `ScreenService`, and `MCPServer` exercise macOS APIs and I/O that are hard to cover in XCTest without a real GUI environment.
  - **Proposed solution:** If coverage is to be enforced, run `/test-coverage` to identify high-priority, testable gaps first; otherwise set an explicit repo threshold or exclude environment-dependent code.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/<ts>.md` → `/03-gh-go`

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `README.md:20` status string `v0.2.2` → `v0.2.3`
- `Sources/SymOperateCore/Models.swift:4` current version `"0.2.1"` → `"0.2.3"`
- `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug.yml:49` placeholder `v0.2.1` → `v0.2.3`
